mechanism: SBC inflates non-GAAP earnings by 15-40% for AI companies, which mechanically compresses the measured ERP when using non-GAAP forward earnings estimates. The reflexive loop amplifies: rising prices → lower perceived SBC cost → better margins → lower ERP → higher prices.
regime_dependence: Amplifies in rising markets (reflexive loop) and reverses in falling markets. The accounting distortion persists regardless of market direction; the reflexive component is regime-dependent.
